title: Oscar Predictions 2026: The names you'll likely hear at Sunday's Academy Awards
text: As the 2026 Academy Awards approached on March 15, various predictions were made for the Best Actor category. Michael B. Jordan for Sinners was predicted to win by several major outlets, following his victory at the Actor Awards two weeks prior. The race became much more open after Timothée Chalamet's loss at the SAG Awards, with the early frontrunner falling from over 70% odds to around 40-45% after Jordan's win. The article highlighted how Jordan's performance as twin brothers Smoke and Stack gave him distinct personalities and technical mastery that impressed voters. Wagner Moura was noted as an underdog with strong critical reception for The Secret Agent, while Leonardo DiCaprio's campaign was described as less visible despite his leading role in One Battle After Another. Ethan Hawke was seen as having a smaller but dedicated group of supporters, and his film Blue Moon was noted as the least-seen among the five nominees. The piece emphasized the unpredictability of this year's Best Actor race compared to previous years, with multiple viable paths to victory even as late as a week before the ceremony.
